drills.name: warmup-pod-restart
drills.purpose: Restart the atlas server during warmup and verify recovery remains bounded.
drills.expected_outcome: Availability returns after the restart and warmup lock ownership remains safe.
verification_steps: Warmup lock contract and metrics exist.
Startup path emits warmup lock lifecycle events.
Recovery evidence is written to the drill report.

drills.name: redis-outage
drills.purpose: Simulate Redis loss and verify the server follows the documented degradation policy.
drills.expected_outcome: Redis dependency failure is observable and the server fails fast or degrades according to contract.
verification_steps: Redis dependency handling is documented.
Error registry contains stable degraded-state codes.
Failure evidence is written to the drill report.

drills.name: offline-network-deny
drills.purpose: Deny external egress and verify the offline profile still serves from pinned data.
drills.expected_outcome: Offline profile remains internally functional with cached-only behavior and no catalog dependency.
verification_steps: Offline profile uses pinned datasets.
Offline profile enables init prewarm.
Offline readiness bypasses catalog dependency.

drills.name: catalog-unreachable
drills.purpose: Simulate catalog unavailability and verify readiness and error behavior remain deterministic.
drills.expected_outcome: Profiles that require catalog readiness fail readiness, while cached-only intent stays ready.
verification_steps: Readiness helper encodes the catalog requirement rule.
Error registry exposes the not-ready code.
Health endpoint contract documents the behavior.

drills.name: store-unreachable
drills.purpose: Simulate store dependency failure and verify retries and error reporting remain bounded.
drills.expected_outcome: Store failure produces stable error taxonomy and does not trigger unbounded retry behavior.
verification_steps: Store failure signals are present in alert rules.
Error registry alignment remains intact.
Release evidence can capture the resulting reports.

drills.name: offline-prewarm-serve
drills.purpose: Run the offline profile through prewarm and verify cached serving remains available afterwards.
drills.expected_outcome: Prewarm requirements are satisfied and the offline profile remains ready without catalog access.
verification_steps: Offline profile lists pinned datasets.
Init prewarm requires non-empty pinned datasets.
Cached-only readiness intent is preserved.

drills.name: rollout-failure-recovery
drills.purpose: Simulate a failed rollout and verify rollback restores healthy service.
drills.expected_outcome: Lifecycle evidence captures rollback and the service health contract returns to healthy.
verification_steps: Lifecycle summary report exists.
Rollback report schema exists.
Upgrade runbook documents rollback verification.

drills.name: invalid-config-rejected
drills.purpose: Inject invalid runtime configuration and verify startup fails cleanly without partial service.
drills.expected_outcome: Invalid configuration is rejected before serving traffic and failure remains observable.
verification_steps: Environment allowlist contract exists.
Config contract tests exist.
Startup log contract can report the rejection deterministically.
